# sdwan_scope (Data Source)

This data source can read the Scope .

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sdwan_scope" "example" {
  id = "f6b2c44c-693c-4763-b010-895aa3d236bd"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The id of the object

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description
- `name` (String) The name of the scope
- `objects` (Attributes Set) List of objects belonging to the scope (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--objects))
- `users` (Set of String) List of users who reference the scope

<a id="nestedatt--objects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `objects`

Read-Only:

- `object_ids` (Set of String) List of object UUIDs
- `object_type` (String) Object type
